TROPICAL DEPRESSION KIYAPO CONTINUES TO MOVE WEST NORTHWESTWARD WHILE MAINTAINING ITS STRENGTH.

KIYAPO SLIGHTLY DECELERATES WHILE MOVING WESTWARD TOWARDS EXTREME NORTHERN LUZON Location of Center (7:00 AM) The center of Tropical Storm KIYAPO was estimated based on all available data at 260 km East of Aparri, Cagayan (18.4°N, 124.1°E).
